title: cirsium horiianum
intro: Cirsium horiianum, also known as the Hori's thistle, is a species of thistle native to Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Cirsium horiianum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to exhibit antiviral and antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or used in a tincture form to extract its medicinal compounds.
